gh_e484025446cd7b270d0ca43e.title: [Remote] Full Stack Developer (React+Node)
gh_e484025446cd7b270d0ca43e.description:
**Who we are and what we do**
Shaw and Partners is a software development provider for high-profile startups with approximately 25 remote staff. We are also incubating two startups. [Christopher Shaw](https://chrisshaw.me/), the founder and CEO, would be your manager. 

**Engineering at Shaw and Partners**

Our clients have funded U.S. startups in LA and NY, so depending on your location, you may need to participate in a late call, but you can set your own schedule.

We’re all here to serve each other. Each team is held in high regard, resulting in camaraderie and support. We also enjoy the freedom to test new technologies using POCs at appropriate intervals. This requires a balanced healthy mindset supported from the top.

We are looking for full-stack developers and accept developers with a stronger focus on either front-end or **back-end.**

**Responsibilities** 

- Design, build, and maintain efficient, reusable, and reliable code
- Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications
- Identify and track bottlenecks and bugs, and devise solutions to these problems
- Help maintain code quality, organization, and internal standards

**Local: 100% remote**

**Required** 

- **English (Fluency in reading and writing, speaking can be intermediate)**
- Frustrated with poorly structured, inefficient, and unmaintainable code
- Experience with testing frameworks, building backend APIs and user-centric frontends
- Solid Computer Science fundamentals knowledge (algorithms, data structures, concurrency, etc.)
Sr. > 5+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using **NodeJS**
Mid-Level > 3+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using NodeJS
Jr. > 1+ years in digital product development on a team of engineers, ideally using NodeJS 

**Differentials** 

- Strong experience and interest in working with Kubernetes, Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform
- Experience with React, TypeScript, Next, and Responsive Web Design, state management patterns and solutions (e.g. Redux) ES2015+, HTML5 APIs and CSS3
- Working experience in Continuous Integration/Deployment
- B.Sc. degree or equivalent in Computer Science or Software Engineering 

**We offer** 

- Fully remote work / geographically distributed team
- Flexible schedule (respond promptly, attend meetings, meet deadlines)
- Long-term contract
- Discretionary equity as an early team member 
- Competitive salary in USD + bonuses
- Fast selection process

**B2B contract - PJ.** 

Full-time = 176h per month 
You manage your time. 

**Discover more at https://shawandpartners.com/opt/?jobId=11
Not a suitable vacancy? Check out other vacancies on our website

gh_e4d8074ab43142f996f76c22.title: 🛠 Senior Full-Stack Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
gh_e4d8074ab43142f996f76c22.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Full Stack Engineer, you'll be key to building and maintaining our innovative web applications, working across both front-end and back-end to ensure a robust, seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Full-Stack Engineer**

1. Work with our tech stack comprising JavaScript, React, Material UI (MUI), Node.js, and other languages, while swiftly adapting to JavaScript if your expertise lies elsewhere.
2. Handle SQL-based databases, mainly PostgreSQL, using ORMs to interact effectively.
3. Utilize containers, K8, and AWS ECS for reliable and efficient application deployment.
4. Develop mobile interfaces using React Native.
5. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams through the full development cycle, from API design to deployment. This includes code reviews, developing reusable code, and collaborating with various engineering teams.
6. Work with our design team to address user pain points and drive improvements in engineering standards and processes. You'll also develop new tools for internal teams and take ownership of your work.
7. Design, build, and maintain APIs, iterating to enhance functionality.
8. Troubleshoot and debug software systems, integrate new components as needed, and address production issues.
9. Launch new markets, features, or products regularly, staying agile to meet market demands.

## **What You Bring**

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degrees preferred.
2. Proficiency in front-end technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and a modern framework such as React.
3. Solid understanding of back-end development using Node.js, Python, or similar.
4. Experience with PostgreSQL and SQL Server databases, including data modeling and query optimization.
5. Familiarity with version control systems (Git), agile methodologies, and CI/CD pipelines.
6. Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.
7. Excellent problem-solving skills with an ability to debug complex software issues.
8. Strong communication and collaboration skills with a team-oriented mindset.

By joining us, you'll not only be a part of a dynamic, innovative environment, but you'll also have the opportunity to grow your technical skills, contribute directly to the success of our projects, and make a tangible impact in our rapidly evolving field. Our inclusive culture encourages collaboration and continuous learning, ensuring that you stay abreast of the latest trends and technologies, broadening your professional horizons, and furthering your career.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

gh_e4e45f65c03b245bde7961fc.title: [Remoto] Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na Coodesh
gh_e4e45f65c03b245bde7961fc.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) com o pop-up personalizado de candidatura. 👋

Fala galera, blz?

Temos 2 vagas para Fullstack Developer.

Não procuramos especialista em uma linguagem de programação. Precisamos de pessoas que saibam resolver o problema do cliente. Muitas vezes o cliente nos passa uma informação de uma forma, mas precisamos nos colocar no lugar do cliente para conseguir entender, e pensar em uma forma em que pode ser até melhor do que ele nos propôs. 

Logo, a capacidade em resolver problemas é muito importante. Não basta só sabermos programar, precisamos saber como cada funcionalidade pode impactar na vida do usuário. Precisamos saber um pouquinho de cada coisa, isso aí é um diferencial.

Somos uma pequena empresa, que está engatinhando no mercado, mas temos ajudado milhares de usuários a crescer, de forma que desenvolvemos ferramentas que facilitam o dia a dia de muitos. Nossos produtos são baratos, queremos ajudar muitos clientes, e ganhar no volume de vendas.

Então você precisará saber um pouquinho de cada coisa: Flutter, Figma (UX/UI), Java e Spring Framework, React.js e Next.js.

  • O formato de horário está Full Time, mas podemos avaliar em outros formatos (4h e 6h).
  • Informe sua pretenção salarial, pois também é um fator determinante.
  • Responda o máximo de perguntas e testes que puder! Seja sincero e não cole!
## TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA:

Temos um aplicativo "carro chefe", que é o Tua Agenda!

Aplicativo muito usado em salões de beleza e afins.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Preact - PostgreSQL - Figma ## Local: 100% Remoto ## Requisitos: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Figma ## Diferenciais: - React - Next.js - Node - iReport ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack

gh_e434827693aa157ffa2e7bbc.title: 🔥 [資深] 3.5M/Y 工程師經理 (全遠端) 🛠 Senior Engineering Lead (Remote) 🚀
gh_e434827693aa157ffa2e7bbc.description:
## **About Us**

We are a **rapidly growing software technology startup** from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT. Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago. As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

Are you seeking a company that transcends traditional constraints of location and time?

If you meet the following criteria, we want to work with you:

1. **Proactive and Independent:** Embrace the freedom to control your own working hours and enjoy the benefits of flexible schedules.
2. **Fully Remote:** Escape the confines of a traditional office setting and thrive in a fully remote work environment.
3. **Ownership and Involvement:** Crave a sense of involvement and autonomy, where your ideas and contributions are valued and recognized.
4. **Strong Entrepreneurial Spirit:** High-energy, possess an adventurous and startup mindset, unafraid of embracing unknown challenges.
5. **Passion for the International Product:** Fuel your ambition by working on projects that transcend borders and embrace the opportunity to collaborate with teams across different parts of the world.

If you are driven, hard-working, and ready to make a significant impact, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and embark on an exciting journey of innovation and growth!

**APPLY NOW:** **https://linktr.ee/growaha**

# **Job Description**

We're seeking a Senior Engineering Lead, a catalyst who thrives in transforming challenges into innovative solutions and inspires their team towards excellence.

### **Your Journey as a Senior Engineering Lead**

1. Influence product and technology decisions, translating complexities into clear strategies.
2. Develop and implement engineering roadmaps, ensuring alignment with overall company vision.
3. Drive key product KPIs, ensuring continuous progress and reporting.
4. Work cross-functionally to design and deliver groundbreaking solutions.
5. Foster a deep understanding of user personas, needs, and journeys within the engineering team.
6. Assist in developing comprehensive business cases and operational plans.
7. Help define the product vision and roadmap, delivering clarity on feasibility, time, cost, and impact.
8. Prioritize product features effectively, enabling collaborative design and execution across teams.
9. Attract, retain, and inspire a world-class engineering team. Cultivate an atmosphere of motivation, innovation, and peak productivity.
10. Foster a high-performing, unified culture where everyone feels valued and heard.
11. Ensure MVP OKRs/KPIs/deliverables are met in collaboration with other teams.
12. Uphold a culture of commitment and accountability within teams, leading by example.

### **What You Bring**

1. BS or MS degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
2. 5+ years of relevant full-time programming work experience.
3. Strong full-stack (front-end and back-end) development skills:
    - Proficiency in JavaScript (Express, Node, React, React Native, Redux), HTML, and CSS highly valued.
    - iOS mobile app experience is a bonus.
    - Given our agile team, the ability to navigate any tech stack and learn new technologies as needed is crucial.
4. Solid grasp of object-oriented programming; familiarity with diverse design and architectural patterns.
5. Strategic thinking, capable of creating robust technical strategies.
6. Experience with swift prototyping and independently resolving ambiguities. We foster innovation and improvisation from every team member.
7. Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.
8. Flexibility for both in-office and remote work arrangements.
9. Quick learning, team-playing, proactively contributing, and self-motivated.
10. Passionate about crafting products that solve real-world problems.

As a leader, your ability to inspire, motivate and bring out the best in your team will be key to our collective success. By joining us, you're not just accepting a job but embracing an opportunity to make a real impact in the tech landscape.

### Additional Qualifications

We are seeking individuals who possess the following qualifications:

1. **Self-Motivation and Ownership:** Demonstrate self-motivation, a passion for continuous learning, and the ability to manage your own work effectively.
2. **User-Centric Mindset:** Show a strong desire to meet user needs and a relentless pursuit of achievement and excellence.
3. **Adaptability and Quick Learning:** Exhibit a customer-oriented approach, with the ability to quickly learn new skills and adapt to unfamiliar domains.
4. **Collaborative Spirit:** Display a willingness to actively participate in the team environment and collaborate effectively with diverse team members.

### Competitive Compensation

We offer competitive salary levels; details can be found at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha). Our salary structure includes flexible working hours, a fully remote setup, and monthly performance-based raises, bonuses, and rewards. 

### This Job Offers You

When you join our team, you can expect:

1. **Flexible and Independent Remote Work:** Enjoy the freedom of flexible working hours and the ability to work remotely.
2. **Performance-Based Rewards:** Receive rewards and bonuses based on your performance and contributions.
3. **Driven and Talented Co-workers:** Collaborate with a group of driven, creative, and multi-talented colleagues who share a deep passion for startups.
4. **Ownership and Impact:** Take direct ownership of your role and responsibilities, making a meaningful impact in our innovative culture.
5. **Learn to Solve Challenging Issues:** Work closely with teams dedicated to creating solutions for some of the most relevant and challenging issues.
6. **Positive Work Environment:** Thrive in a work environment built on trust, accountability, collaboration, curiosity, fearlessness, kindness, and respect.

Please review our **Pre-Interview Info at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)** before applying.

Ready to join our team? **Apply now at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)**.

gh_e43426d1a2257902e81afbcb.title: Vagas da Pipo Saúde com localização incorreta
gh_e43426d1a2257902e81afbcb.description: Ao que parece o job board da Pipo Saúde (https://pipo-saude.breezy.hr/), usa Polyglot (https://airbnb.io/polyglot.js/) para lidar com traduções, o que faz com que alguns textos apareçam não traduzidos se o JS não for executado na página, o que faz com que a localização da vaga apareça como `%LABEL_POSITION_TYPE_WORLDWIDE%`.
